name: aws-ecs-cdk-framework
description: AWS CDK framework for ECS Fargate services with YAML configuration

scripts.deploy:dev: npm run validate && cdk deploy --context environment=dev
scripts.deploy:qa: npm run validate && cdk deploy --context environment=qa
scripts.deploy:uat: npm run validate && cdk deploy --context environment=uat
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run validate && cdk deploy --context environment=prod

author: kollaharsha
